headingHtml: Rp 6 million sends one child to school for a whole year.

benefits.title: Quality education
benefits.text: A full year of tuition for one student.

benefits.title: Learning materials
benefits.text: The essentials: books, pens, and a backpack.

benefits.title: School uniform
benefits.text: A complete uniform so they fit in and show up.

benefits.title: A dedicated mentor
benefits.text: A community manager guiding each child's progress.

donut.ariaLabel: Scholarship mix: 18 middle-school, 8 high-school, 4 university students
